root_cause: Double multiplication - confidence already percentage, multiplied by 100 again

symptom: Three strategies all named 'CandlePattern' causing attribution collision
root_cause: RSI Extreme and OGZTPO strategies both named 'CandlePattern'
minimal_fix: Renamed to 'RSI' and 'OGZTPO' respectively, added OGZTPO default contract

symptom: Pattern learning corrupted - outcomes recorded against wrong pattern keys
root_cause: Exit RSI normalization used (rsi-50)/50 (-1 to 1) but entry used rsi/100 (0-1)

symptom: No automatic detection when pattern recording breaks
root_cause: Pattern system corruption only discovered after weeks of lost data
minimal_fix: Added healthCheck() method that runs every 10 trade exits
what_worked: Automatic health check detects broken pattern recording
